heading: Consideration of recommendations of Presidential Commission
label: 80r–8 Consideration of recommendations of Presidential Commission
text: In carrying out their duties under this subchapter, the Council and the Board of Regents shall take into consideration the reports and plans submitted by the National Museum of African American History and Culture Plan for Action Presidential Commission under the National Museum of African American History and Culture Plan for Action Presidential Commission Act of 2001 ().Public Law 107–106
notes: References in TextThe National Museum of African American History and Culture Plan for Action Presidential Commission Act of 2001, referred to in text, is , , , which is not classified to the Code.Pub. L. 107–106115 Stat. 1009Dec. 28, 2001
